highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.4 adds a new GTK4 view, Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, and rolls the 3.119.3 preview work.
highlights_body: It also lands NativeAOT fixes, delay-loads D3D12 to survive on hosts without DirectX 12, refactors SKManagedStream around an SKData snapshot, refreshes libpng and libwebp, and enforces `-Wl,--no-undefined` on Linux and Android natives so regressions surface at link time.

bullets.detail: Bumps libpng to 1.6.54 then 1.6.58, libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and removes unused externals so the shipping surface stays lean.
New GTK4 view built on the GirCore Gtk-4.0 bindings, giving GTK4 apps a first-party `SKDrawingArea`.

bullets.lead: SKManagedStream reworked around an SKData snapshot
bullets.detail: Replaces the parent/child stream chain with an `SKData` snapshot so managed streams cannot outlive their parent — clearer lifetime semantics and no more chained-stream footguns.
Fixes a crash when SkiaSharp is consumed from a NativeAOT app that has reflection disabled via `IlcDisableReflection=true`.
Adds the fontconfig runtime library to the cross-compile sysroot so Linux ARM64 builds locate fontconfig at runtime and no longer crash on first text draw.

bullets.lead: SKGLView redraws after MAUI TabBar tab switches on Android
bullets.detail: Restores rendering when an `SKGLView` is hosted inside a MAUI TabBar and the tab is switched away and back.

bullets.lead: GTK4 SKDrawingArea Cairo assertion crash fixed
bullets.detail: Fixes a Cairo assertion that would crash the GTK4 `SKDrawingArea` on first draw.
Delay-loads the D3D12 DLLs so SkiaSharp keeps working on Windows hosts that do not have DirectX 12 installed instead of failing to load.
Uses the `DesignMode` property directly in WindowsForms controls to fix rendering inside the Visual Studio designer.
Publishes Linux Bionic native assets so SkiaSharp can be consumed from Android-native (bionic) runtimes, not just the managed Android target.

bullets.lead: Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds
bullets.detail: Adds x64 and arm64 architectures to the Tizen native build matrix and updates the Tizen support to Studio 6.1 with corrected TFMs and a 3-tab sample.

bullets.lead: tvOS native builds split per architecture
bullets.detail: Splits the tvOS device and simulator native builds into separate frameworks (matching the iOS pattern) so the `NativeReference` targets pick the right binary for each architecture.

bullets.lead: .NET 10 SDK band with pinned workload versions
bullets.detail: Moves the build to the .NET 10 SDK with pinned workload versions, and updates `rollForward` from `latestPatch` to `latestFeature` so servicing keeps flowing.

bullets.lead: PolySharp brings C# 13 to legacy TFMs
bullets.detail: Adopts PolySharp so the binding project can use C# 13 language features across every target framework, including net48.

bullets.lead: net48 full-framework target for Windows validation
bullets.detail: Adds a net48 target and uses it to validate that SkiaSharp still consumes cleanly from full-framework .NET on Windows.
Enforces the `-Wl,--no-undefined` linker flag so any unresolved native symbol surfaces at link time instead of at first call in production.

bullets.lead: Spectre mitigation on libSkiaSharp for Linux and Windows
bullets.detail: Enables the Spectre mitigation compiler flag for `libSkiaSharp.dll` on Windows and `libSkiaSharp.so` on Linux to reduce the impact of speculative-execution side-channel attacks.

contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Added Linux Bionic native assets, the net48 full-framework validation target and adopted PolySharp so binding/ can use C# 13 on legacy TFMs
contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Added the Spectre mitigation compiler flag to `libSkiaSharp.dll` and `libSkiaSharp.so`
contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Moved the AI agent config to a shared location so it works for both Claude Code and GitHub Copilot
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: Fixed `SKGLView` not rendering after MAUI TabBar tab switches on Android

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 rolled up the entire 3.119.3 preview line — libpng, libwebp and brotli refreshes, the NativeAOT and Linux ARM64 fontconfig crash fixes, Spectre mitigation on Windows and Linux — and then added the new GTK4 view, Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, the `SKManagedStream` `SKData` snapshot rework, tvOS device/simulator split, delay-loaded D3D12, the MAUI TabBar `SKGLView` fix and the .NET 10 SDK move.
